series_metadata.series_description: Bid Documents--records to show that proper pro- cedures were followed in obtaining construction contractors. Operation and Maintenance Manuals--Auidelines for maximizing the operational efficiency of the treatment plants. General Correspondence from comm

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating unit until com- pletion and audit of project. Upon release of federal audit report, file can then be sent to the Federal Archive., Paper: Archives
